notes:
### v1.3.12

#### Fixed
- Calendar widget positioning (Calendar popover now centered in viewport regardless of app window size, preventing it from glitching outside visible area)
- Calendar week cycle display (Calendar now shows the ongoing week cycle (Wednesday to Tuesday) by default instead of the upcoming reset cycle)
- Planned badge not updating immediately (Planned badge now appears immediately on character cards when assigning a character to a signup, without requiring a page refresh)
- Clear reservation dialog (Displays both local reservations and signup sheet assignments together for unified management)
- Dashboard stat row alignment (All stat labels now display in a single row as intended)
- Character assignment to planned raids (Added dispatchCalendarChanged call after assignment to ensure immediate badge update on character cards)
- Calendar character filtering (Improved character filtering for raid assignments using proper content_id matching from RAIDS data)
- Auto-delete expired assignments (Assignments are now automatically deleted from local storage and database when loading calendar events if they have expired)
- Leader displayed twice in signup sheets (excluded leader status from DPS/SUP/ANY column filters)
- Raid train duplicate user display (changed deduplication key from userId to userId_role)
- Dashboard character card raid ordering (moved sortOrder sorting before Object.values mapping)

#### Added
- Calendar in dashboard stat bar (Calendar widget integrated into dashboard stat bar for easy access to planned raids and signup sheets)
- Clear reservation dialog (Added checkbox-based clear reservation dialog to select and remove multiple reservations at once)
- Weekly reset calendar view (Calendar now shows weekly reset view with day filtering for better navigation of upcoming raids)
- Requester Discord ID tracking for app-created signup sheets
- Automatic DM notifications when app-created signup sheets are published
- Automatic request status update to 'closed' when sheet is published from request
- Explicit sortOrder field to Raid interface for consistent raid progression display
- SQL query to add requester_discord_id field to raid_signup_sheets table

#### Removed
- Argeos Winter Event (Removed content from tasks, dashboard stats, and UI components as the event has ended)

#### Technical
- Reservation reactivity improvements (Made reservations reactive with single event dispatch to reduce redundant updates and improve performance)
- TypeScript type safety (Created CombinedReservation type to handle both local reservations and signup assignments with proper type checking)
- Accessibility improvements (Added ARIA roles, labels, and keyboard ESC support to dialog overlays)
- Database schema change: ALTER TABLE raid_signup_sheets ADD COLUMN requester_discord_id TEXT
